title: Corporate planning and implementation
summary: 9609 A Level — turning strategy into action plans and monitoring progress.
learningObjectives: Link functional plans to corporate strategy.

simpleExplanation.title: From plan to practice
simpleExplanation.summary: Corporate plans set objectives and allocate resources. Implementation requires coordination, leadership, and change management.

sections.content: **Corporate planning** (6.2.2) completes **Topic 6**. Focus on **why strategies fail to implement** in evaluation.
